response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Factory Reset Scope","description":"Connect to the MSO4/5/6 scope, reset it to factory defaults using the verified FACtory command, check for errors, and disconnect.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"s2","type":"write","label":"Reset to Factory Defaults","params":{"command":"FACtory"}},{"id":"s3","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}},{"id":"s4","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
